title: FlyHigh
description:
HOW FAST CAN YOU REACH THE BOSS?You don’t walk — you “swing.”
In this action-adventure, you move through a world of floating islands using a crossbow with a grappling hook. Your goal: reach the top and defeat the boss as fast as possible. How you get there is completely up to you.

Core GameplayGrappling Instead of Walking:
Your most important mechanic is the grappling hook. Use it to pull yourself through the air, from island to island, always higher. Precision, timing, and good movement decide between victory and a long fall.

Fight & Survive:
Many enemies with different attack patterns stand in your way. You must decide: fight them or swing past them? Some fights are worth it — others will cost you precious time.

High Risk, High Reward:
Some of the strongest upgrades are found in extremely dangerous places. One wrong jump — and you fall all the way back down.

Progression & UpgradesLoot & Items:
You can find upgrades:

• freely in the world (plants, items),

• in caves,

• in secret areas,

• in loot drops,

• or in chests with different rarities: Normal, Silver, Gold, and Crystal.

Dangerous Chests:
Not every chest is safe — some of them explode when you open them.

Special Crossbows:
There are several special crossbows with unique effects, for example:

• one that improves your stats with every kill,

• one that shoots bombs and deals area damage,

• and one with a chargeable ability that launches you explosively into the air.

Each crossbow changes your playstyle.

Stat SystemAlongside classic stats like:

• Health

• Stamina

• Damage

• Speed

there are two important special stats:

Grapple Length:
How far your grappling hook can reach — one of the most important stats in the entire game.

Lives:
Extra lives let you continue after death.

Exploration & PuzzlesSecret Caves:
Many caves are locked. To open them, you must find hidden buttons in the environment — sometimes obvious, sometimes almost impossible to spot.

Interactive Islands:
Some islands can be picked up and moved — but not infinitely, or you would break the entire game.

Goal & ReplayabilitySpeedrun-Focused:
After every run, your time is saved. Try to beat your own record!

Play Your Way:

• Rush straight to the boss.

• Explore every cave.

• Max out your stats.

• Or hunt perfect runs.

Every run feels different — depending on your choices, your skill, and your willingness to take risks.
description_short: Grapple across floating islands, fight dangerous enemies, and hunt powerful loot. Master risky movement, upgrade your stats, and race to the top to defeat the boss as fast as possible. Every run is a new challenge.
